keywords_map.hint: 参考燕云十六声、逆水寒等精美游戏CG风格

character_three_view.prefix: 杰作，最佳质量，超精细，8K分辨率，游戏角色三视图设计表，CG数字插画，中国修仙游戏美术风格
character_three_view.suffix: 全身三视图（正面、侧面、背面），纯白色背景隔离，电影级光影，高度精细，游戏角色设计表，禁止文字，禁止标签，禁止注释，禁止水印

character.prefix: 杰作，最佳质量，超精细，8K分辨率，风格化游戏角色艺术，半写实CG数字插画，中国修仙游戏美术风格，非照片写实，非超写实，非真实照片，非2D平面动漫，非赛璐璐着色
character.suffix: 全身正面视图，纯白色背景隔离，戏剧性三点电影级光影，高度精细，高级游戏制作角色设计表，禁止文字，禁止标签，禁止注释，禁止水印，禁止标注线

scene.style: 中国修仙世界美学，游戏CG风格
scene.suffix: 禁止文字，禁止标签，禁止注释，禁止水印

props.style: 修仙法器/物品，游戏CG风格
props.layout: 特写产品摄影风格,纯白色背景隔离

generate_scenes.ref_prompt_template: 4K resolution, master-level quality, location reference sheet for animation production. Maintain the original style, material language, color palette, lighting direction, color temperature, contrast and shadow shapes from the reference image. Realistic perspective: no exaggerated wide-angle; all vertical lines must remain straight. Do not mirror-flip the scene. No people, no animals, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no watermarks. Layout structure: LEFT - Bird's-eye reference, camera directly above, 45-60 degree top-down angle. CENTER - Multi-Angle Views vertically stacked: front view, right-side view, left-side view. RIGHT - Detail Breakdown, 3-4 close-up shots. Scene description: {description}

additions: CRITICAL: strictly inherit and match the exact art style from the iref reference image
same color palette and color temperature
same lighting direction and shadow quality as the reference
STRICT LAYOUT: left third=bird-eye overhead 45-60 degree top-down view
center third=three stacked views (front view top, right-side view middle, left-side view bottom)
right third=3 to 4 close-up material and texture detail shots
maintain clear visual separation between three sections
strictly ancient Chinese xianxia architecture and materials only

ref_retry_default_additions: CRITICAL: strictly match the visual style color and materials from the iref image
maintain style consistency throughout all viewing angles

generate_props.white_bg_constraint: pure white background, clean solid white studio background, NO scene background, NO environment, NO room, NO floor texture, NO wall, NO gradient background, NO stone ground, NO textured background, isolated prop on white only
